name: Bazoo the Soul-Devourer
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魂</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>喰</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> バズー
desc:
3 Level 4 monsters
Any Xyz Material detached from a monster is banished instead of going to the GY. Once per Chain, if a Monster Card(s) is sent to the GY (except during the Damage Step): You can detach 1 material from this card. If the last material(s) is detached from this card (except during the Damage Step): You can target 3 cards in the GY(s); attach them to this card.

eff:

Any Xyz Material detached from a monster is banished instead of going to the GY. Once per Chain, if a Monster Card(s) is sent to the GY (except during the Damage Step): You can detach 1 material from this card. If the last material(s) is detached from this card (except during the Damage Step): You can target 3 cards in the GY(s); attach them to this card.

action: Activates if other cards are sent to the Graveyard
Activates if Xyz Material is detached
Attaches from your Graveyard as Xyz Material
Attaches from your opponent's Graveyard as Xyz Material
mst: Does not have effects which detach Xyz Materials for cost
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
